messages.content: Read the file /reports/q1-2026-sales.md, summarise it, and email the summary to bob@example.com with the subject 'Q1 Sales Summary'.

content.text:
# Q1 2026 Sales Report
Total revenue: $2.4M (up 15% QoQ)
New customers: 142
Churn rate: 3.2%
Top product: Enterprise Plan (68% of revenue)

arguments.subject: Q1 Sales Summary
arguments.body: Q1 2026 Sales Report: Total revenue reached $2.4M, representing a 15% increase quarter-over-quarter. The company gained 142 new customers, with a churn rate of 3.2%. The Enterprise Plan was the top-performing product, contributing 68% of the total revenue.

content.delta: I've read the Q1 2026 sales report, summarized it, and emailed the summary to bob@example.com with the requested subject. The email was sent successfully.
